title: [epic] Renode LoRa simulation ecosystem extraction
description:
Meta-epic: extract LICHEN Renode work as standalone open-source projects.

THESIS: We accidentally built the missing LoRa simulation ecosystem for Renode. Nobody else has because the intersection of Renode expertise + LoRa expertise + CI motivation is tiny, and hardware is cheap enough that most people just buy boards.

CHILDREN:
- ddcu: SX126x peripheral (the core)
- 94ju: Meshtastic board definitions (T-Echo, RAK4631, T-Deck)
- tg2h: STM32WL SubGHz peripheral

SEQUENCING:
1. ddcu first (SX126x is dependency for boards)
2. 94ju second (boards need SX126x)
3. tg2h parallel (independent chip family)

VALUE:
- Enables CI for Meshtastic, LoRaWAN, RadioLib projects
- Reduces barrier to LoRa firmware development
- Positions LICHEN as good ecosystem citizen

TIMING: P3 - do after simulation is working for our own needs (sz52 gate)
